description_long: This armchair features a wide, deep seat with thick, plush cushioning and a high, generously padded backrest for maximum comfort. The upholstery is a soft, light gray fabric with a subtle herringbone pattern, giving it a modern yet cozy appearance. Both armrests are broad, flat, and fully upholstered, providing ample support and a relaxed sitting experience. The chair sits on short, sturdy block feet made of dark wood, which are only partially visible beneath the base. The overall silhouette is boxy and substantial, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic. The visible seams and tailored edges add a touch of refinement to the otherwise casual design.
description: A wide, plush armchair with light gray herringbone upholstery, thick cushions, and broad padded armrests, supported by short dark block feet.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick back cushion, and broad, padded armrests with visible seams.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the back cushion, and the solid, blocky armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full backrest and the continuous herringbone fabric pattern, with block feet just visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the deep seat, thick back cushion, and broad armrest.
attribute_backrest_style: high, rectangular, thickly padded, with a single loose cushion
